wins.event: Data Center segment revenue $2.3B record, +80% YoY driven by MI300X ramp
MI300 fastest-ramping product in AMD history, $1B in less than 2 quarters
2024 Data Center GPU guidance raised again from $3.5B to $4B+
Client segment revenue $1.4B, +85% YoY on Ryzen 8040 ramp
Server CPU revenue share gain in seasonally down Q1; nearly 900 EPYC public cloud instances

risks.event: Gaming segment revenue $922M, -48% YoY and -33% sequential (5th year of console cycle)
Embedded segment revenue $846M, -46% YoY on customer inventory normalization
MI300 supply constraints from CoWoS and HBM packaging

guidance.notes: Data Center GPU 2024 guidance raised from prior $3.5B (set last quarter) to $4B+ on strengthening MI300 demand.

_notes: Strong AI/DC story with second consecutive guidance raise. Significant Gaming/Embedded weakness offsets but story remains clearly bullish.
